status: rigorous complex-strip bounds for the endpoint C0 factor and its first derivative; not corrected transversality, Lambda<=0, or RH
proof_boundary: This artifact proves |C0|<5 and |C0'|<60 on the stated complex strip and proves that L>=50 radius-1/L endpoint collars map into it. It does not by itself complete the full refined remainder constants, prove the corrected first-jet lower bound, exclude a positive Newman boundary, prove Lambda<=0, or prove RH.

exact.removable: The numerator vanishes at p=+-1/2, so both apparent poles are removable
exact.near_proof: sin(pi*|Re w|)>=2*sqrt(2)*|Re w| and sinh(pi*|Im w|)>=2*sqrt(2)*|Im w|
exact.cauchy: A boundary bound |C0|<3 on radius 1/4 gives |C0'|<30 on radius 3/20
exact.outside_lower: Outside the two radius-3/20 disks, the strip width 1/100 forces dist(Re p, Z+1/2)>1/10 and |2*cos(pi*p)|>=2*sin(pi/10)
exact.collar_map: For L>=50 and |z-x|<=1/L, the fixed-N map p_N(z)=1-2*(sqrt((z/2+pi*t/8)/(2*pi))-N) stays in this strip

rows.claim: The endpoint factor is meromorphic only in appearance at the two half-integers.
rows.formula: C0(p)=(exp(pi*i*(p^2/2+3/8))-i*sqrt(2)*cos(pi*p/2))/(2*cos(pi*p)); The numerator vanishes at p=+-1/2, so both apparent poles are removable

rows.claim: A fixed outer circle around each removable point has a uniform denominator lower bound.
rows.formula: For z=p0+w, |w|=1/4 and p0=+-1/2, |2*cos(pi*z)|=2*|sin(pi*w)|>=sqrt(2); sin(pi*|Re w|)>=2*sqrt(2)*|Re w| and sinh(pi*|Im w|)>=2*sqrt(2)*|Im w|
rows.proof_boundary: Exact elementary trigonometric and hyperbolic inequalities.

rows.claim: Arb bounds C0 on both removable-point outer circles.
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the analytic numerator bound and denominator lower bound.

rows.claim: Cauchy's estimate controls C0' through neighborhoods of both removable points.
rows.formula: A boundary bound |C0|<3 on radius 1/4 gives |C0'|<30 on radius 3/20

rows.claim: Away from the removable disks the denominator is uniformly separated from zero.
rows.formula: Outside the two radius-3/20 disks, the strip width 1/100 forces dist(Re p, Z+1/2)>1/10 and |2*cos(pi*p)|>=2*sin(pi/10)
rows.proof_boundary: Covers the padded strip outside both inner disks.

rows.claim: Direct quotient differentiation bounds C0 and C0' on the outside region.
rows.proof_boundary: Arb evaluates conservative elementary numerator and denominator budgets.

rows.claim: The near and outside covers give one rigorous complex-strip bound.
Every radius-1/L critical collar with L at least 50 maps into the certified p-strip.
rows.formula: For L>=50 and |z-x|<=1/L, the fixed-N map p_N(z)=1-2*(sqrt((z/2+pi*t/8)/(2*pi))-N) stays in this strip
rows.proof_boundary: Fixed N and principal square-root branch.

rows.claim: The derivative input left open by the endpoint holomorphic-lift artifact is now explicit.
rows.proof_boundary: Closes the local C0 bound, not the corrected first-jet lower bound.

rows.claim: A correction-factor derivative bound does not imply Newman transversality.
rows.formula: C0 strip control != T_L[J] lower bound
